description: LLM-as-a-judge evaluation rubric for leasing Q&A answers

values.1: Acceptable — criterion partially met or with caveats

correctness.description: The answer is factually accurate based on the provided leasing policy

faithfulness.description: The answer only uses information from the provided policy — no invented facts

clarity.description: The answer is clear, well-structured, and easy to understand

policy_alignment.description: The answer correctly reflects company policy boundaries (does not over-promise or make guarantees not in the policy)

hallucination.description: 0 = hallucination present, 1 = minor unsupported claim, 2 = no hallucination detected
hallucination.note: Lower score is worse — 0 means hallucination was found

judge_instructions: Score each criterion independently. For hallucination criterion: assign 0 if the answer makes a specific claim (amount, guarantee, policy rule) that is NOT in the system prompt. Assign 1 if the answer contains vague unsupported phrasing. Assign 2 if the answer is fully grounded.
